Router job name differs from catalog entity xdata primitives and includes regapp setup.
Router job name differs from the catalog entity xdata read primitive.
Router job creates a simple block definition by combining block table and entity append primitives.
Router job inserts a block reference; catalog uses lower-level blockref and database insert operation IDs.
Router job counts block definitions; catalog exposes block symbol table and iterator primitives.
Router job uses layout manager behavior not represented by an exact catalog op ID.
Router job lists layouts through layout dictionary/manager state; catalog has no exact layout-list op.
Router job filters xref block table records; catalog does not expose a dedicated xref-list op.
Router capability contract reports current host support instead of invoking one catalog primitive.
Router job installs the current Ariadne editor reactor; catalog separates reactor attach and monitor primitives.
Router job reports Ariadne reactor registration state; catalog exposes monitor categories, not this registry contract.
Router job removes the current Ariadne editor reactor; catalog uses lower-level detach primitives.
Router job reports Ariadne overrule registration state; catalog has query/install primitives but no registry contract.
Router job installs the Ariadne object overrule and enables the runtime overrule path.

Headless modelspace graph IR: one record per entity (handle, DXF type, layer, owner_handle, type-specific geometry). IMPLEMENTED: additive else-if branch in AriadneNativeJob.cpp (op=="inspect.database.graph") backed by the collectModelSpaceGraph helper (adjacent to inspect.database.summary). Compiled into Ariadne.AcadNative.crx and smoked via accoreconsole on a staged DWG copy: entities[] length equals modelspace_entities and equals inspect.database.summary's count (3==3 on the small drawing; 291706==291706 at scale). Known limitation: non-ASCII names funnel through acharToAscii -> '?' (M02). Router/registry allow-list wiring (autocad-router.ps1) is a separate follow-up; smoked directly, not via the router. NOTE: .arx relink was blocked by a live full_autocad session lock, so the full_autocad host carries the prior .arx until its next rebuild; the coreconsole host is fully updated.
evidence_refs: CADOS_M01 Lane D native triage (inspect.database.graph insertion point)

operations.summary: Filtered, read-only SQL query over the modelspace IR. cadctl builds an ephemeral SQLite store from the dwg_graph_ir.v1 document (sqlite_ir_store.build_store, rtree bbox index) and runs the SQL via sqlite_ir_store.query.
operations.implementation_notes: IMPLEMENTED (M02). Handler = tools/sqlite_ir_store.py build_store+query, wired through tools/cadctl.py Cad.query. Verified live this session against the native_full IR runs/m02_cadctl_rich/dwg_graph_ir.json: store built (drawings 1 / entities 21747 / layers 70 / blocks 248, rtree available), and 'SELECT dxf_name, count(*) GROUP BY dxf_name' returned LINE 16276 / INSERT 2027 / POLYLINE 1874 / ARC 753 / HATCH 669 / MTEXT 106 / CIRCLE 33 / TEXT 9 (= the golden by-type truth). entities columns: handle, class, dxf_name, layer, owner_handle, space, geometry_kind, bbox_*, geometry_json. Truthful degradation: cadctl.query returns not_implemented if sqlite_ir_store (Lane B2) is absent, blocked if the IR file is missing.

operations.summary: Deterministic, read-only validation of a dwg_graph_ir.v1 document and its run folder via the gate suite in validator.py (ir_schema_present, entity_count_consistency, required_artifacts_exist, no_original_write_evidence, registry_status_consistency, run_folder_completeness). Emits a validation_report.v1.
operations.implementation_notes: IMPLEMENTED (M02). Handler = tools/validator.py validate_target, wired through tools/cadctl.py Cad.validate. Verified live this session against runs/m02_cadctl_rich/dwg_graph_ir.json: rollup status 'pass', 6/6 gates pass (ir_schema_present, entity_count_consistency, required_artifacts_exist, no_original_write_evidence, registry_status_consistency, run_folder_completeness). The registry_status_consistency gate reads THIS file and asserts the required wired-baseline ops (inspect.database.summary, inspect.entity.count) are status=implemented. Truthful degradation: cadctl.validate returns not_implemented if validator (Lane E) is absent, blocked if the IR file is missing.

operations.implementation_notes: Real staged-copy write lifecycle: stage copy -> pre-inspect (native_full IR) -> native write op (write_copy) -> post-inspect -> cad_diff.compute_diff -> validator (14/14 gates) -> journal. Original DWG byte-unchanged (sha256 before==after). Live-verified on the golden: +1 LINE, 21747->21748.
